mapper.insert: insert into lego_vector_store_collection_bindings (profile_id, physical_collection_name, kb_collection_id) values (#{profileId}, #{physicalCollectionName}, #{kbCollectionId})
mapper.select: select profile_id, physical_collection_name, kb_collection_id, created_at from lego_vector_store_collection_bindings where profile_id = #{profileId} and physical_collection_name = #{physicalCollectionName}
